|desc={{p|Druddigon}} is Drayden's only known Pokémon. It was first used to battle [[Iris's Fraxure]], where it easily defeated its opponent. When Drayden was speaking to the press in front of his Gym, Druddigon roared at the crowd to get them to quiet down. During Drayden's Gym battle against Black, Druddigon went up against Black's {{p|Braviary}}, [[Brav]]. With its speed, Druddigon proved to be a powerful foe but was defeated when Brav opened a door to let in a blizzard, freezing Druddigon in place and leaving it wide open to an attack.

Druddigon's known moves are {{m|Dragon Tail}}, {{m|Dragon Rage}}, and {{m|Rock Climb}}, and its Ability is {{a|Sheer Force}}.}}

Drayden also has at least three other Pokémon in his arsenal as seen in the flashback in the battle against Iris.
